text:
This article is about the character from the Secret of Evangelion game. For the character from Evangelion Battlefields game, see Hitomi Amagi.

 is an original character from Secret of Evangelion game.

Profile

She is a talented woman with a PhD in metaphysics. After entering NERV, she was appointed to the Project E. Her main job is to further develop Evangelion units like being involved in production of dummy systems and dummy plugs https://web.archive.org/web/20120103202408/http://www.cyberfront.co.jp/title/eva_soe/chara.html Recognized for her excellence by Kōzō Fuyutsuki, who knew her father who was also a physicist. She is clumsy, for example, using green tea leaves when making black tea blends and using the men's shower. She has a strong emotional personality, and she often lets her emotions acts and later regrets it. She is not good with men, and her first priority is to live as a scientist, not as a woman.

History

Secret of Evangelion

She utilizes Evangelion Unit-04 to further her motivations by controlling it using the dummy plug. https://game.watch.impress.co.jp/docs/20061017/eva.htm 

Trivia

Her surname, , comes from the Japanese aircraft carrier Kaga of the Japanese Imperial Navy.
She shares the first name with the character Hitomi Amagi from the Evangelion Battlefields mobile game.
